description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set on a raised, multi-tiered square platform made of weathered stone. The obelisk itself consists of four vertical pillars arranged in a cross pattern, each with a rectangular cross-section and a slightly tapered top. At the center, a taller central pillar is topped with a five-pointed star, giving the structure a commemorative or memorial character. The base is surrounded by a paved stone area, bordered by a strip of green vegetation, which frames the monument and adds contrast to the gray stone. The surface of the stone is rough and aged, with visible discoloration and moss growth in some areas. There are no visible inscriptions or detailed ornamentation, but the geometric arrangement and central star provide a sense of solemnity and purpose.
description: A weathered stone obelisk monument with four pillars and a central star, set on a raised, square stone platform surrounded by paving and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central pillar with a star, flanked by three other pillars and the main entry to the platform.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the platform and the arrangement of the pillars from a lateral perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the obelisk and the symmetry of the four pillars, with the star still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the stone platform's width and the vertical alignment of the pillars.
attribute_ornamentation: A five-pointed star at the top of the central pillar; otherwise, none visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, square stone platform with a central raised section supporting the obelisk. The platform is constructed from large, weathered stone blocks and is surrounded by a paved stone area. There are no visible steps, but the platform is elevated above the surrounding paving.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the central pillar is adorned with a five-pointed star, which is the only decorative feature at the top. The other pillars have flat, slightly tapered tops.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a paved stone area bordered by a strip of green vegetation, which frames the monument on all sides.
